selectDeviceHelp: Select a device from the left to view data.
tooltipSelectSingle: Click to select only this device
tooltipToggleMulti: Toggle multi-select (check to add or remove this device)
sidePanelSelectionHelp: Click a device name to show only that device. Use the checkbox to add or remove devices for multi-selection.
authSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard
heroTagline: JT-DYNAMIX IoT telemetry platform — secure smart data collection with real-time analytics.
deleteAction: Are you sure you want to delete this device? This action cannot be undone.
